name: Drill BUILDSKILL 136
description: BUILDSKILL 136 PCs Impact 800W Corded Electric Drill Toolkit | 3300 RPM | 48000 Impact Rate | Copper Motor | 13mm Keyless Chuck Drill Machine for Wall Drilling | Forward-Reverse | Professional & DIY
aboutItem:
About this item
136 Pieces Impact Drill Toolkit: BUILDSKILL 136 pieces electric drill toolkit is perfect for tackling everything from simple fixes to ambitious DIY projects. With a wide array of tools, you’ll be ready for any challenge—whether it’s hanging shelves or assembling furniture. This toolset empowers you to unleash your creativity and transform your living space effortlessly!
800W Impact Drill with Copper Motor & 13mm Keyless Chuck: This toolkit contains durable & heavy duty 800W copper motor drill machine with a 13mm Keyless chuck which opens wide range applications like wood, metal & wall drilling for professionals & DIY projects.
3300 RPM Variable Speed & 48000 BPM Impact Rate: The electric drill provides easy speed control, which is beneficial for precision work. When no load, the first gear can reach a rotation speed of up to 3300 times per minute (rpm) and can deliver as many as 48000 impacts per minute (bpm).
Wood, Metal & Masonry Drill Bits Set Combo of 10: BUILDSKILL 800W Drill Machine Kit offers combination of total 10 drill bit sets which includes - 3 x Wood Bits (3/5/6mm), 3 x HSS Bits (3/5/6mm), 3 x Masonry Bits (3/5/6mm) & 1 x Multipurpose Bit (6mm).
Best in Class Hand Tools Set: BUILDSKILL drill machine kit includes best in class hand tools set like 8oz claw hammer, 6" combination plier, 8"adjustable wrench, 3 meter auto lock measuring tape, 10-in-1 screwdriver set & 133 more to make it a best drill toolkit for every professional & DIY tasks.
Warranty and Customer Support : BUILDSKILL offers 6 months warranty on all Power Tools. For any product queries, replacements, or warranty assistance, please reach out to our BUILDSKILL Customer Care team. (Available Monday to Friday, 10:00 AM - 5:30 PM)

name: Carving Chisel Set
description: Professional Wood Carving Chisel Set, Carbon Steel Woodworking Tools, Power Grip Chisels Kit for Beginners & Kids
aboutItem:
✦【Premium Quality Material】： Well made from high quality carbon steel with electrolytic coating and razor sharp blade, perfect general wood carving projects with stencils and patterns, touching up antique furniture, any Miniature or micro models, spoons, bowls, box or animals, such as Eagles, Fish, bears or even elephants. Works on linoleum, clay sculpture and soapstone too.
✦【Ergonomic Wooden Handle】: The tools feature 4.5″ergonomically designed wooden handles allowing you to handle long projects comfortably and enhance a precise control. The blades are tightly held into the handle, no more worry about snapping off!
✦【Perfect for Beginners】： This set contains all the tools needed by a wood carving beginner.First use a all-purpose cutting knife to cut out the rough outline, and then use 12 detail knives with different shapes to carve out the details. Please wear cut-resistant gloves to ensure safety during this process. After the wood carving is formed, remove the sawdust with the small brush provided, and finally clean the tools with a wipe cloth.
✦【Wide Use & Great gift】: Suitable for woodworking, carving, whittling, sculpting, marking, shaping, modeling, cutting, graining and scraping, also for plastic, soap, clay sculpture, linoleum, pumpkin, fruits, etc .As a gift for yourself, kids, lover, parents, especially Mother's Day is coming.
✦【After Sales Commitment】: Each tool is professionally pressure tested to make sure it's well made, so we promise to provide it with a 100% refund policy,，Any product issue makes you dissatisfy with this tools set , Let us know and we will make it right, Full Refund or a Free Replacement, Whichever you prefer.

name: BOSCH GSB 600 Impact Drill
description: BOSCH GSB 600 Impact Drill Machine for Home & Professional Use, 100Pcs Accessory Kit | 600W Motor | 13mm Chuck | 3000 RPM | 48000 BPM | Variable Speed | 1 Year Warranty
aboutItem:
Powerful Tool: The BOSCH GSB 600 Corded Electric Impact Drill is a robust and long-lasting drill machine powered by a 600 W motor. It is capable of handling demanding tasks and is designed to endure with its high-quality construction. Additionally, the new carbon brush incorporated into the drill contributes to its longevity.
Variable Speed: The electric drill provides easy speed control, which is beneficial for precision work. When no load, the first gear can reach a rotation speed of up to 3000 times per minute (rpm) and can deliver as many as 48000 impacts per minute (bpm).
Rated Torque and Chuck Capacity: The electric corded impact drill offers a torque of 1.4 Nm, which is sufficient for standard drilling activities. The chuck, which secures the drill bit, accommodates bits with a maximum diameter of 13 millimeters mm.
Forward/Reverse Rotation & Double Insulation: You can adjust the direction of the drill’s rotation, simplifying the process of drilling or removing bits. The drill features two layers of insulating material covering the live components, enhancing safety during use, and eliminating the need for grounding (connection to the earth for safety).
Applications: The BOSCH electric corded impact drill is highly versatile, suitable for drilling into masonry such as bricks, metal, and wood. It can also be employed for hole sawing and driving screws into metal and wood.
Scope of Supply: Upon purchasing this impact drill kit, you will also receive a 98-piece drill bit set (4/5/6/7/8/9/10/25 mm), 1 x depth gauge, 1 x auxiliary handle.
Warranty: The Warranty of this product is valid for 1 year from the invoice date (invoice copy needed for claims) by the brand. You can find more details about BOSCH Power Tools on India's toll-free customer service number and use the BOSCH BeConnected App on the packaging for extended warranty and rewards.

Multi-Collet Compatibility for Versatile Use: Comes with 6mm, 6.35mm (1/4 inch) and 8mm collets, allowing compatibility with multiple router bits, making it ideal for carpenters, furniture makers, interior work and DIY woodworking projects.
Compact & Ergonomic Design for Better Control: Lightweight and easy-to-handle compact design provides excellent control and stability during operation, ensuring clean edges, accurate cuts and smooth finishing on wood, plywood, MDF and laminates.
Ideal for Multiple Woodworking Applications: Perfect electric router trimmer for edge trimming, chamfering, carving, pattern making, slot cutting, laminate trimming and decorative woodworking, making it a must-have tool for professionals and hobbyists.
Durable Construction for Professional Performance: Built with strong motor housing and high-quality components to ensure durability, long life and reliable performance for heavy duty carpentry, furniture making, cabinet work and home DIY projects.

name: GSR 120 Li Cordless Drill
description: BOSCH Professional GSR 120 Li Cordless Drill Driver | Speed (1st/2nd)- 0-400/0-1500 RPM | Torque (Hard/Soft)- 30/14 Nm | Chuck Capacity of 10 mm | 1 12V Battery & 1 charger Included| 1 Year Warranty
aboutItem:
Single Battery Drill Driver: The BOSCH GSR 120 Li Drill Driver with a strong 12V battery, provides sufficient power for a variety of drilling, screwing, and fastening jobs. It functions in two modes: forward and reverse rotation for tightening and loosening screws easily. This adaptability allows you to work with different materials and applications effortlessly, making it a dependable tool for both DIY tasks and professional use.
Compact Design & Lightweight Drill Driver: The compact design of this drill driver makes it possible to work in confined spaces and overhead without feeling burdened. With its lightweight and easy to handle construction, this drill driver promotes comfort even during prolonged use.
No-Load Speed and Torque: The cordless drill driver offers a no-load speed of 0-400 RPM in 1st gear and 0-1500 RPM in 2nd gear, catering to various tasks. It can deliver 30 Nm of torque for hard joints and 14 Nm for soft joints, ensuring excellent and optimised performance in drilling and driving applications with a 2-Speed Planetary gearbox.
Chuck Capacity: Its chuck can hold bits with a maximum diameter of 10 mm, providing flexibility for different applications. This guarantees that you can securely attach the appropriate bit for the job.
Torque Settings: The cordless drill driver provides 20+1 torque settings providing versatility of various screwdriving and drilling applications.

name: Cordless Drill Machine
description: Enon 12.6V Cordless Drill Machine for Home Use | 3-in-1 Impact Drill & Screwdriver | 1500RPM, 22Nm | 25 Torque Settings | 2x1.5Ah Batteries | 82-Piece Kit | Magnetic Base (XE-CD1610)
aboutItem:
3-IN-1 VERSATILITY FOR EVERY JOB - Works as an Impact Drill, Standard Drill, and Screwdriver, one tool replaces three. Drill through wood, metal, plastic, concrete, and ceramic tiles with ease. Ideal for home repairs, furniture assembly, shelving, and renovation projects.
POWERFUL & PRECISE - 12.6V motor delivers 1500 RPM and 22Nm max torque for fast, efficient drilling and driving. 25-level torque settings let you dial in exactly the right power for every task from delicate screwing into softwood to heavy-duty drilling through masonry.
2-SPEED CONTROL + LED WORK LIGHT- Low gear (0–400 RPM) for precision screwdriving and fastening; high gear (0–1500 RPM) for fast drilling. Built-in LED light illuminates dark corners, overhead spaces, and tight cabinets so you always drill where you aim.
2 BATTERIES + 82-PIECE KIT- READY TO WORK STRAIGHT OUT OF THE BOX - Includes 2x 1.5Ah Li-Ion batteries so one charges while the other powers your work-zero downtime. Comprehensive 82-piece accessory kit includes drill bits, screwdriver bits, and sockets for every application.
ERGONOMIC DESIGN + 6-MONTH WARRANTY- Soft-grip handle reduces hand fatigue during extended sessions. Magnetic base holds screws and bits hands-free so nothing rolls away mid-job. 10mm keyless chuck for fast bit changes. Backed by 6-Month ENON Warranty and customer support
WHAT’S IN THE BOX: This cordless impact drill machine kit comes with 82 premium accessories which includes charger, 2x1.5Ah lithium batteries with dust plug and anti vibration rubber inside, screwdriver bits with adaptor, PH2 screw bits, 9x5-13mm mini sockets, 8mm masonry bit, 6mm ceramic bit, HSS drill bits, a pair of gloves, screws, PVC sleeves, flexible driver pipe, all in an easy to carry case.
SPECIFICATIONS: Voltage – 12.6V, No load speed - 400-1500RPM, Three Setting Modes (Screwdriver, Drill/Impact Drill, Hole slaw), Chuck Size -10mm, Inbuilt LED Light, Currents - 0-25A
boxContents: Cordless impact drill machine with magnets, charger, 2x1.5Ah lithium batteries, screwdriver bits with adaptor, PH2 screw bits, 9x5-13mm mini sockets, 6mm ceramic bit, HSS drill bits, a pair of gloves, screws, PVC sleeves, flexible driver pipe, all in an easy to carry case.

name: Tomahawk DMS-3000
description: Tomahawk DMS-3000 12V Cordless Drill Machine & Screwdriver Kit for Home | 10mm Keyless Chuck | 600 RPM | 24 Nm, 18+1 Clutch | 1.5Ah Battery + Charger | LED Light
aboutItem:
⚡ Powerful 12V Cordless Drill Machine: A strong 12V motor delivers up to 24 Nm of torque at 600 RPM, cutting cleanly through wood, metal, plastic and drywall. This versatile drill machine is built for the home and worksite - ideal for drilling holes for wall hooks, curtains, shelves and fittings, assembling furniture, and everyday DIY, repair and woodworking jobs.
🔧 18+1 Torque Settings + Drill Mode & Reverse: The adjustable clutch lets you dial in the exact force for each screw size and material, preventing stripped screws and damaged surfaces, while drill mode unlocks full power for tough holes. A forward/reverse trigger drives and removes screws with ease, so it doubles as a powerful cordless screwdriver and electric screwdriver for furniture, fittings and repairs.
📏 Built-in Spirit Level: An integrated bubble level helps you drill perfectly straight and level holes for shelves, frames, curtain rods and fittings - giving professional, accurate results without needing a separate spirit level.
💡 10mm Keyless Chuck & Built-in LED Light: Change drill bits and screwdriver bits in seconds by hand - no chuck key needed - so you switch quickly between drilling and driving. The built-in LED work light brightens dark cabinets, corners and tight spaces for accurate, safe drilling even in low light.
📦 Complete Drill & Screwdriver Kit: Includes flexible shaft, 9-pc socket set, screwdriver bit set, drill bits, carry case, hex adapter plus charger and 1.5Ah Battery - a ready-to-use cordless screwdriver and drill machine set for home, DIY and workshop tasks straight out of the box.
🛡️ 6-Month Warranty & Genuine After-Sales Support: Backed by a 6-month warranty covering manufacturing defects in the motor of this cordless power tool. Our authorised India-based service team helps you with genuine spare parts, quick repairs and friendly product guidance, Monday to Saturday.
